About Vantum Surgical

Where precision
meets purpose.

Our Story

Sialkot-crafted.
US-delivered.

Sialkot, Pakistan has supplied over 70% of global surgical instruments for more than a century. Vantum Surgical was built to bring this manufacturing excellence to the world with modern ISO compliance and US-based distribution.

We combine traditional Pakistani craftsmanship with CNC precision machinery and rigorous quality control — instruments trusted by hospitals and distributors in 30+ countries.

Process

How we build
every instrument.

01

Material Selection

Grade 304 and 316L surgical stainless steel sourced from certified mills. Every batch tested for composition and hardness.

02

CNC Precision Machining

Computer-controlled cutting and forming to within 0.01mm tolerances. Consistent geometry across every production run.

03

Hand Finishing

Skilled craftsmen refine edges, joints, and mechanisms by hand — the touch that machines cannot replicate.

04

Electrolytic Polishing

Electropolishing removes surface imperfections and creates a smooth finish that resists bacterial adhesion.

05

Quality Control

100% visual inspection under magnification. Functional testing of all moving parts. Dimensional verification against spec sheets.

06

Packaging & Sterilization

Instruments packaged in validated sterile barrier systems. Autoclave-tested and CE-marked for direct clinical use.

Ready to source
precision instruments?

Get a quote within 24 hours.
